title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Okobore Town Villagers, Unknown person #7, Zoro as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: About four years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This village was quite down on its luck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: People would not infrequently starve to death.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And just when we thought we'd not make it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A pirate ship washed up on our shores.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The village people tied up the weakened pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, stealing all the food and supplies they had on board for themselves, managed to eat for the first time in a long time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the pirates, who had watched them finish their meal,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then broke, without any trouble, the bonds holding them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought they'd attack us for what we'd done, but one of them spoke thus:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Where can I go to get you guys dessert?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone was shocked. To think that'd we'd be saved by shipwrecked pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ACE AND HIS FRIENDS STAYED WITH US FOR A FEW WEEKS.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: and o-tama became very attached to him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hmm.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Any doctors in the area?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And where can I get water and food?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Food and treatment will be free! Please, help me.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll take TAMA with me!

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: As thanks for giving me food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: OH! A KIMONO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y"KNo, armor and a helmet would be cool, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For certain reasons, I cannot go into town. I'm leaving o-tama to your care! Don't worry about money, I'll manage by BOR- rowing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But I've gotta find my friends, first.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of idiot would wear such things as part of their daily outfit? I'm giving you these because you'd stand out too much in your usual clothes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take this sword, too. It looks pretty samurai-y.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Okay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yagh! Wait! You idiot! You can't take that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even touching that named Blade is a grave offense!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My ancestor, Kotetsu, forged that! It is a sword known across the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on, Tama! I'll take you to a doctor right away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is one of the 21 Great Grade Swords! Its name is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nidal KITETSU!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Sword Grade

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Among the countless blades (swords, Spears, and the like) across the world, those made by craftsmen of legend are classified as follows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The 12 Supreme Grade swords the 21 Great Grade Swords the so skilful grade swords

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kitetsu? I feel like I've heard that somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's fine! Lemme take it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no no! You must not!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Then trade me for yours!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This one is a named Blade, too, fool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your blade is cursed! I don't want to carry it around!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Its curse will befall you, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't forgive you if something happens to O-TAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: 'Kay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Be sure to bring it back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can you hear me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WOOF WOOF

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ah! Dog!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Will you take me there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Whew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WOOF!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 53 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
